test.query: SELECT URL as col FROM (SELECT URL FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 60000000) ORDER BY col LIMIT 1000,1
SELECT SearchPhrase as col FROM (SELECT SearchPhrase FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 60000000) ORDER BY col LIMIT 10000,1
SELECT SearchPhrase as col FROM (SELECT SearchPhrase FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 60000000) WHERE notEmpty(col) ORDER BY col LIMIT 10000,1
SELECT MobilePhoneModel as col FROM (SELECT MobilePhoneModel FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 60000000) ORDER BY col LIMIT 90634,1
SELECT MobilePhoneModel as col FROM (SELECT MobilePhoneModel FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 60000000) WHERE notEmpty(col) ORDER BY col LIMIT 1536885,1
SELECT PageCharset as col FROM (SELECT PageCharset FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 60000000) ORDER BY col LIMIT 23076,1
SELECT Title as col FROM (SELECT Title FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 60000000) ORDER BY col LIMIT 1000,1
